stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) ↔ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, (x ≐ ⊠x) ↔ x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ (⊬ □g.1)
For every type α with instances [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], any two elements x y : α that satisfy x ≐ ⊠x and y ≐ ⊠y are equivalent: x ≐ y.
There exists a type α with instances [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] and an element x : α such that Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) and x ≐ ⊠x both hold, but x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) does not hold.
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ (⊬ g.1)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≤ □x

∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x ∧ ¬ (x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))

∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x ∧ ¬ (⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α}, h.1 ≤ ⊠h.1 ↔ h.1 ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)
There exists a type α with instances [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] and elements x y : α such that x ≐ ⊠x and y ≐ ⊠y hold, but x ≐ y does not hold.
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ((∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≐ □x) ↔ (□(⊠(⊤ : α)) ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)))

∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α) ∧ ¬ ∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x ∧ x ≐ □x
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ((⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) ↔ ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))
